name: Specs Views
summary: Alternative visualization views for spec data: list view, document view, technical document view, detail panel, and sync progress display. Provides tab navigation between views.
goals: Display specs as a hierarchical list with expandable items
Render specs as formatted documents (specs document and technical document)
Show a detail panel for selected graph nodes
Display real-time sync progress with status indicators

acceptanceCriteria.when: user switches to the list view
acceptanceCriteria.then: specs are displayed as a hierarchical, expandable list

acceptanceCriteria.when: the sync progress view is displayed
acceptanceCriteria.then: current progress status and any errors are shown

end-to-end.when: user navigates through the view tabs
end-to-end.then: each view renders the spec data in its respective format

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
